about.title: About Us
about.body: IDS Detergenti is a company with years of experience in producing detergents for domestic and industrial use, committed to offering superior quality and respect for the environment through our on-tap products and professional lines.

homeProducts.title: Our Product Lines
homeProducts.subtitle: Discover the complete range of our cleaning products for every need.

franchise.title: Join Us
franchise.subtitle: High-quality LOFTY products guarantee your success!

store.title: Store
store.body: Open a complete retail point dedicated exclusively to Lofty products (min 20 sqm).

corner.title: Corner
corner.body: Add a dedicated area for Lofty on-tap products inside your existing business.

profit.title: Profit
profit.body: No royalties, very high profit margins, and highly loyalty-building products for customers.

hero.title: Open Your LOFTY Store
hero.subtitle: A unique opportunity to start your business in the on-tap detergents world

offer.title: WHAT WE OFFER
items: Quality products, competence and experience in the detergent sector.
Furnishings and advertising package for the point of sale.
~1200 kg of various Lofty and Tergo' products.
Circulating packaging (drums, taps).
Organization of the opening event + advertising materials.
Promotional products for customers during the opening event.
Assistance in the professional training of staff.
Supply according to a schedule within 24 hours.
Innovation and continuous research on quality improvement.
Radio-TV Promotion, Web Marketing, Urban promo, Trade Fairs.

requirements.title: WHAT WE LOOK FOR
items: License as a natural or legal person.
Initial investment of 250,000 ALL (new).
Suitable environment with a minimum area of 20 m².
No cost for use of the brand/trademark.
No percentage/royalty on sales.
Exclusive sale only of Lofty on-tap products.
No blocking conditions on the trade of packaged products under other brands.
No blocking conditions on the trade of household items, cosmetics, etc.
Minimum order of 100 kg.
Clean environment and welcoming to customers.

carousel.title: Your success starts here
carousel.subtitle: Look at the setup of our stores. A strong coordinated image and quality products that attract customers.

cta.title: Join the winning team!
cta.subtitle: Don't miss the opportunity to start a sustainable, profitable and ecological business.

certifications.title: Our Certifications
certifications.subtitle: Certified Excellence
certifications.desc1: IDS Detergenti is proud to operate according to the highest international standards. Every process, from production to logistics, is monitored to ensure safety and total quality.
certifications.desc2: Our dedication is proven by the EN ISO 9001 and EN ISO 14001 certifications.
